finalOwner.ownershipDecision: Awareness Brief owns what_happened and why_gridly_elevated_it after active-state evidence ownership is applied; Community Pulse owns where_it_is_happening; directional awareness has no retained ownership slot.

finalDetermination.intentionalOrAccidental: Accidental integration/ownership defect for persistence expectations; intentional active-awareness refresh logic is operating, but there is no explicit directional persistence arbitration.
